title: The Ringside Story
original_title: リングサイド・ストーリー
overview: Kanako is dating Hideo. He is an unpopular actor. They have dated for 10 years with Kanako supporting him. She has worked at a bento factory, but she loses her job. Kanako begins to work as a staff member for a professional wrestling organization and becomes attracted to the sport.

trailers.title: 『リングサイド・ストーリー』　本予告

trailer_groups.title: 『リングサイド・ストーリー』　本予告

en.title: 『リングサイド・ストーリー』　本予告
